stakeholder_id.description: Affected provider slug or id (northstar | alpha | beta | gamma | delta | epsilon).

claim_telemetry_summary.description: Summary of the provider's claim telemetry: baseline vs observed claim volume and the disruption pattern.

business_continuity_runway_days.description: Days the provider can sustain the disruption before liquidity stress.

disruption_score.description: Severity of the claim-flow disruption, 0.0 to 1.0.

liquidity_assessment.description: Liquidity / payment-continuity pressure given the runway.
